speaker: internal
text: Crescent Family Medicine this is Diana.

speaker: external
text: Hi I'm trying to get a refill on my lisinopril. I'm down to my last two pills.

speaker: internal
text: Sure can I have your name and date of birth?

speaker: internal
text: Got it. I see you're due for a follow-up before we can authorize another 90-day refill. Do you want to come in this week or do a video visit?

speaker: internal
text: I have Wednesday at 4:15 with Dr. Singh. Does that work?

speaker: internal
text: I'll send the join link to your email this afternoon. Have a great day.
